title: The Princes Fight to Save Noah
description: On pages 5–7, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Fish-Man Island Citizens. The central beat is the princes fight to save noah.
scene: The scene focuses on the princes fight to save noah, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Fish-Man Island Citizens shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You must leave as well, your majesty!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Where did all these pirates come from?!

summary: The Princes Fight to Save Noah. This part advances the end of the Fish-Man Island conflict and the island’s attempt to move beyond inherited hatred.
